svg.title: leader-k8s acquire and release sequence
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing Kubernetes Lease acquisition, contention, action execution, auto extension, owner conditional release, minimum lease time, and expired takeover behavior.
svg.text: Lease ownership is granted by holderIdentity plus resourceVersion update success; release is also owner-conditional.

g.text: Group election repeats the same sequence against <lockName>-slot-N Lease objects.

svg.text: github.com/bluetape4k/bluetape4k-leader / leader-k8s - Lease holderIdentity, resourceVersion updates, and owner-conditional release.
